message:
feat(policy): integrate ConnectorCredentialBroker into PolicyEngine authorize pipeline

Add CredentialBrokerConfig to SafetyConfig and wire ConnectorCredentialBroker
as the 6th integrated subsystem in PolicyEngine. The authorize() pipeline now
checks credential broker access rules for ConnectorCredentialAction, denying
unauthorized connector access and recording denials to both AuditChain and
ComplianceEngine.

- CredentialBrokerConfig: enabled, max_audit_events, max_leases_per_connector,
  max_sensitivity ceiling
- ConnectorCredentialBroker::from_config() constructor
- check_connector_access() for policy gate integration
- ActionKind::is_connector_action() helper
- credential_broker/credential_broker_mut() accessors on PolicyEngine
- 7 integration tests (broker default, from_config, deny, allow, compliance
  feed, disabled bypass, non-connector bypass)
- Fix pre-existing borrow-after-move in runtime.rs TailerConfig

ft-3681t.5.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
